body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-2611", "cvss": {"score": 9.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-346", "name": "Origin Validation Error"}], "description": "In MLflow version 3.9.0, the MLflow Assistant feature introduced improper origin validation in its /ajax-api endpoints. This vulnerability allows a remote attacker to exploit cross-origin requests from a malicious webpage to interact with the MLflow Assistant running on a victim's local machine. By bypassing the loopback-only restriction, the attacker can modify the Assistant's configuration to enable full access, which in turn allows the execution of arbitrary commands via the Claude Code sub-agent. This issue is resolved in version 3.10.0.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00371, "percentile": 0.28972}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-67c5-x5mf-rppq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-04T15:23:35Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-67c5-x5mf-rppq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-67c5-x5mf-rppq"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-2611"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-19T10:16:22Z", "published_at": "2026-05-19T12:31:37Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2611", "https://github.com/mlflow/mlflow/commit/8f9c8a53af90842944101eb8b7d60706822c81bc", "https://huntr.com/bounties/8462addd-b464-4a84-b6a2-5529604e6e5a", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-67c5-x5mf-rppq"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mlflow/mlflow", "summary": "MLflow: Improper Origin Validation in MLflow Assistant /ajax-api Endpoints Enables Browser-Mediated Local Command Execution", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-04T15:23:35Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-67c5-x5mf-rppq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.10.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "mlflow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "= 3.9.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
